prompt: Generate a simple flat design famous tall buildings for an information graphic, featuring Taipei 101, Burj Khalifa and Shanghai Tower. Render this scene using the minimalist geometric shapes and limited cool blue/green palette seen in the reference image buildings and trees.
searchQueryGenerated: Modern flat design information graphics icon set
prompt_refined: Generate an information graphic featuring simple, flat design representations of three famous tall buildings: Taipei 101, Burj Khalifa, and Shanghai Tower. Depict these buildings side-by-side, applying the minimalist geometric shapes and limited cool blue/green color palette observed in the buildings and trees of image 1.
